title: AI Moderation
subtitle: Automatic moderation powered by OpenRouter. Configure models, thresholds, and rules below.
general.notice: Leave "Dry-run" enabled while you test. In dry-run, the plugin logs decisions but never blocks posts, hides content, or files flags.
field.enabled.help: Master on/off. When disabled, no content is sent to the AI.
field.dryRun.help: Log decisions but do not act on them. Safe default for first-time setup.
field.reanalyzeEdits.help: Each edit consumes additional budget. Keep off unless needed — edits are a common way to bypass moderation.
apikey.detected: API key detected (source: %1). To rotate, update the chosen source and click Save (or Restart NodeBB).
apikey.missing: No API key found. Set it via one of the three sources below (first non-empty wins):
apikey.source.config: — under this key in NodeBB's config.json
apikey.source.file: plain text file at the path specified below (useful on managed hosts like Cloudron where you cannot set env vars or edit config.json)
field.apiKeyFile.help: Absolute path to a file whose contents are the API key. Example: /app/data/openrouter_api_key (Cloudron). Only used when env var and config.json are both empty.
models.notice: Start typing to pick from the OpenRouter catalog, or enter any model ID manually. See the README for recommendations.
models.load_failed: Could not load catalog: %1. You can still type a model ID manually.
field.triageModel.help: Fast and cheap. Runs on every post before it is published.
field.escalationModel.help: Stronger model. Runs asynchronously for posts where triage is uncertain.
field.blockThreshold.help: If any category confidence ≥ this value, the post is rejected at creation (or hidden/deleted after save).
field.flagThreshold.help: If any category confidence ≥ this value (but below block), a flag is filed.
thresholds.help: When triage confidence lands between the escalation bounds, the stronger model is called for a second opinion during async review.
field.categories.help: Comma-separated. Default: spam, toxicity, nsfw, pii, promotion.
field.customRules.help: Add context the model needs — forum topic, what counts as off-topic, language expectations, etc.
customRules.examples: ▸ Show 3 example prompts + a meta-prompt for generating your own
customRules.metaPromptLabel: Meta-prompt — paste into Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini to have it write your rules
customRules.metaPromptHint: Fill in the [DESCRIBE YOUR FORUM] bracket with a sentence or two about your community, run it through any capable chat AI, then paste the AI's output into the textarea above.
categoryActions.notice: Map each category to an action when it exceeds the flag or block threshold. Valid actions: flag, hide, delete.
field.systemReporterUid.help: UID used when the plugin files a flag. Default: 1 (first admin).
cidOverrides.notice: Override any setting per NodeBB category ID. Overridable: blockThreshold, flagThreshold, escalationLow, escalationHigh, triageModel, escalationModel, categories, customRules.
field.exemptRoles.help: Comma-separated group names. Defaults: administrators, Global Moderators.
field.reputationExemptThreshold.help: Users with reputation ≥ this value are skipped. Set to 0 to disable.
field.budgetFallback.help: "Queue" defers the analysis; "Pass" allows content through without moderation.
playground.notice: Paste any text to see how the currently-configured model would classify it. Doesn't affect real posts.
playground.title: Title (optional)
saved.title: Saved
status.label: Status
